---
title: "Spatial Plot"
author: "Kanako Terakawa"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r Fig2A-D_panels}
# Fig2A-D Spatial 4-panel plot
# Proof-of-concept cohort
# H&E background + spatial spots

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(Seurat)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tibble)
  library(patchwork)
  library(grid)
  library(scales)
  library(viridis)
  library(abind)
})

# Settings

valid_samples <- c("HK2529_ST", "HK2877_ST", "HK2844_ST")

out_dir <- "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/figures_for_paper/Spatial Plot/Proof-of-Concept cohort/"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

timestamp <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")

# Display settings

HE_ALPHA <- 0.4

SHOW_PANEL_TITLES <- FALSE   # TRUE to show each panel title (pA-pD)
SHOW_FIGURE_TITLE <- TRUE    # TRUE to show the sample name on top

TITLE_FONT <- "Arial"
LEG_FONT   <- "Arial"

TITLE_SIZE     <- 24
FIG_TITLE_SIZE <- 16

LEG_TITLE_SIZE <- 20
LEG_TEXT_SIZE  <- 20

CBAR_HEIGHT <- 4.1  # color bar height, cm
CBAR_WIDTH  <- 0.7  # color bar width, cm
LEG_KEY     <- 1.1  # discrete legend key size, cm
LEG_DOT_SIZE <- 8

LEG_TITLE_GAP <- 16
PANEL_HGAP    <- 14

NA_BORDER_COL <- "#999999"
NA_BORDER_W   <- 1.5

DOT_SIZE <- 1.4
GWR_COEF_CAP <- 5

# Image -> Sample lookup

img_sample_map <- data.frame(
  image = Images(susz),
  sample = sapply(Images(susz), function(img) {
    unique(
      susz$orig.ident[
        colnames(susz) %in% rownames(susz@images[[img]]@coordinates)
      ]
    )[1]
  }),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

print(img_sample_map)

# Spot label

susz$Spot_Label <- ifelse(
  !is.na(susz$M2_Coeff) & susz$M2_Coeff > 0 & susz$M2_AdjP < 0.05,
  "High-coupling",
  "Reference"
)

susz$Spot_Label[is.na(susz$M2_Coeff)] <- "NA"

susz$Spot_Label <- factor(
  susz$Spot_Label,
  levels = c("High-coupling", "Reference", "NA")
)

# Color palettes

m2_palette <- function(n = 100) {
  viridis::rocket(n, begin = 0.15, end = 0.95, direction = -1)
}

fib_palette <- function(n = 100) {
  viridis::mako(n, begin = 0.15, end = 0.95, direction = -1)
}

gwr_diverging <- c(
  "#08519C", "#4292C6", "#9ECAE1",
  "#FFEDA0",
  "#FEB24C", "#FD8D3C", "#E31A1C"
)

hc_cols <- c(
  "High-coupling" = "#D55E00",
  "Reference"     = "#666666",
  "NA"            = "#DDDDDD"
)

# H&E layer helper

get_HE_layer <- function(obj, img_name, alpha = HE_ALPHA) {
  
  img_array <- obj@images[[img_name]]@image
  
  if (is.null(img_array)) {
    warning(paste("No image array for", img_name))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  cat("    H&E array dim:", dim(img_array), "\n")
  
  # RGB -> RGBA
  if (length(dim(img_array)) == 3 && dim(img_array)[3] == 3) {
    alpha_layer <- array(
      alpha,
      dim = c(dim(img_array)[1], dim(img_array)[2], 1)
    )
    img_array <- abind::abind(img_array, alpha_layer, along = 3)
  }
  
  list(
    grob   = grid::rasterGrob(img_array, interpolate = TRUE),
    height = dim(img_array)[1],
    width  = dim(img_array)[2]
  )
}

# Continuous spatial panel

make_panel <- function(coords_s,
                       HE_info,
                       feature,
                       palette_fn,
                       lim,
                       title,
                       color_label,
                       oob_method = scales::squish) {
  
  p <- ggplot(
    coords_s,
    aes(x = imagecol, y = -imagerow, color = .data[[feature]])
  )
  
  if (!is.null(HE_info)) {
    p <- p +
      annotation_custom(
        HE_info$grob,
        xmin = 0,
        xmax = HE_info$width,
        ymin = -HE_info$height,
        ymax = 0
      )
  }
  
  p <- p +
    geom_point(size = DOT_SIZE, alpha = 0.9) +
    scale_color_gradientn(
      colors = palette_fn,
      limits = lim,
      oob = oob_method,
      na.value = "#DDDDDD"
    ) +
    guides(
      color = guide_colorbar(
        barheight = unit(CBAR_HEIGHT, "cm"),
        barwidth  = unit(CBAR_WIDTH, "cm"),
        title.position = "top"
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      title = if (SHOW_PANEL_TITLES) title else NULL,
      color = color_label
    ) +
    coord_fixed() +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      
      plot.title = if (SHOW_PANEL_TITLES) {
        element_text(
          hjust = 0.5,
          face = "bold",
          size = TITLE_SIZE,
          family = TITLE_FONT
        )
      } else {
        element_blank()
      },
      
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.title = element_text(
        size = LEG_TITLE_SIZE,
        face = "bold",
        family = LEG_FONT,
        margin = margin(b = LEG_TITLE_GAP)
      ),
      legend.text = element_text(
        size = LEG_TEXT_SIZE,
        family = LEG_FONT
      ),
      legend.key.height = unit(CBAR_HEIGHT, "cm")
    )
  
  return(p)
}

# Discrete high-coupling panel

make_high_coupling_panel <- function(coords_s,
                                     HE_info,
                                     n_hc) {
  
  coords_ordered <- coords_s %>%
    arrange(Spot_Label == "High-coupling")
  
  p <- ggplot(
    coords_ordered,
    aes(x = imagecol, y = -imagerow, color = Spot_Label)
  )
  
  if (!is.null(HE_info)) {
    p <- p +
      annotation_custom(
        HE_info$grob,
        xmin = 0,
        xmax = HE_info$width,
        ymin = -HE_info$height,
        ymax = 0
      )
  }
  
  p <- p +
    geom_point(size = DOT_SIZE, alpha = 0.95) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = hc_cols,
      na.value = "#999999",
      drop = FALSE
    ) +
    guides(
      color = guide_legend(
        override.aes = list(
          shape  = c(16, 16, 21),
          colour = c("#D55E00", "#666666", NA_BORDER_COL),
          fill = c("#D55E00", "#666666", "#F7F7F7"),
          stroke = c(0, 0, NA_BORDER_W),
          size   = LEG_DOT_SIZE
        )
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      title = if (SHOW_PANEL_TITLES) {
        paste0("High-coupling Spots (n = ", n_hc, ")")
      } else {
        NULL
      },
      color = NULL
    ) +
    coord_fixed() +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      
      plot.title = if (SHOW_PANEL_TITLES) {
        element_text(
          hjust = 0.5,
          face = "bold",
          size = TITLE_SIZE,
          family = TITLE_FONT
        )
      } else {
        element_blank()
      },
      
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.text = element_text(
        size = LEG_TEXT_SIZE,
        family = LEG_FONT
      ),
      legend.key.height = unit(LEG_KEY, "cm"),
      legend.key.width  = unit(LEG_KEY, "cm")
    )
  
  return(p)
}

# Main loop

for (target_sample in valid_samples) {
  
  cat("\nGenerating:", target_sample, "\n")
  
  img <- img_sample_map$image[img_sample_map$sample == target_sample]
  
  if (length(img) == 0) {
    cat("  No image - skipping\n")
    next
  }
  
  img <- img[1]
  cat("  Image:", img, "\n")
  
  HE_info <- get_HE_layer(susz, img, alpha = HE_ALPHA)
  
  coords_s <- GetTissueCoordinates(susz, image = img) %>%
    rownames_to_column("Barcode") %>%
    left_join(
      susz@meta.data %>%
        rownames_to_column("Barcode") %>%
        dplyr::select(
          Barcode,
          M2Mac_fraction,
          Fibrosis_Score,
          M2_Coeff,
          M2_AdjP,
          Spot_Label
        ),
      by = "Barcode"
    )
  
  n_hc <- sum(coords_s$Spot_Label == "High-coupling", na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # Per-sample color limits
  
  m2_vals <- coords_s$M2Mac_fraction[!is.na(coords_s$M2Mac_fraction)]
  
  m2_lim_hi <- if (length(m2_vals) > 0) {
    quantile(m2_vals, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    1
  }
  
  if (is.na(m2_lim_hi) || m2_lim_hi <= 0) {
    m2_lim_hi <- max(m2_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  }
  
  if (is.na(m2_lim_hi) || m2_lim_hi <= 0) {
    m2_lim_hi <- 1e-6
  }
  
  fib_vals <- coords_s$Fibrosis_Score[!is.na(coords_s$Fibrosis_Score)]
  
  fib_lim_lo <- quantile(fib_vals, 0.10, na.rm = TRUE)
  fib_lim_hi <- quantile(fib_vals, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  if (is.na(fib_lim_lo) || is.na(fib_lim_hi) || fib_lim_lo == fib_lim_hi) {
    fib_lim_lo <- min(fib_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
    fib_lim_hi <- max(fib_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  }
  
  # Four panels
  
  pA <- make_panel(
    coords_s   = coords_s,
    HE_info    = HE_info,
    feature    = "M2Mac_fraction",
    palette_fn = m2_palette(100),
    lim        = c(0, m2_lim_hi),
    title      = paste0("M2 Macrophage Score (0–", round(m2_lim_hi, 3), ")"),
    color_label = "M2Mac"
  )
  
  pB <- make_panel(
    coords_s   = coords_s,
    HE_info    = HE_info,
    feature    = "Fibrosis_Score",
    palette_fn = fib_palette(100),
    lim        = c(fib_lim_lo, fib_lim_hi),
    title      = paste0(
      "Fibrosis Score (",
      round(fib_lim_lo, 2), "–", round(fib_lim_hi, 2), ")"
    ),
    color_label = "Fibrosis"
  )
  
  pC <- make_panel(
    coords_s   = coords_s,
    HE_info    = HE_info,
    feature    = "M2_Coeff",
    palette_fn = gwr_diverging,
    lim        = c(-GWR_COEF_CAP, GWR_COEF_CAP),
    title      = paste0("GWR Coefficient (±", GWR_COEF_CAP, ")"),
    color_label = "Coeff"
  )
  
  pD <- make_high_coupling_panel(
    coords_s = coords_s,
    HE_info  = HE_info,
    n_hc     = n_hc
  )
  
  # Combine panels
  
  fig_map <- (pA | pB) / (pC | pD)
  
  if (SHOW_FIGURE_TITLE) {
    fig_map <- fig_map +
      plot_annotation(
        title = target_sample,
        theme = theme(
          plot.title = element_text(
            hjust = 0.5,
            face = "bold",
            size = FIG_TITLE_SIZE,
            family = TITLE_FONT
          )
        )
      )
  }
  
  fig_map <- fig_map &
    theme(
      plot.margin = margin(
        t = 4,
        r = PANEL_HGAP,
        b = 4,
        l = PANEL_HGAP
      )
    )
  
  print(fig_map)
  
  # Save
  
  file_base <- file.path(
    out_dir,
    paste0(
      "Spatial_4panel_",
      target_sample,
      "_v8_HE_noPanelTitle_",
      timestamp
    )
  )
  
  ggsave(
    filename = paste0(file_base, ".pdf"),
    plot = fig_map,
    width = 16,
    height = 13,
    units = "in",
    device = cairo_pdf
  )
  
  ggsave(
    filename = paste0(file_base, ".png"),
    plot = fig_map,
    width = 16,
    height = 13,
    units = "in",
    dpi = 300,
    bg = "white"
  )
  
  cat("  ✓ Saved:", file_base, "\n")
}
```

```{r Figure_4_KPMP_DKD_Spatial_v11}
# Figure 4: KPMP DKD Spatial Plot v11
#   Base: v9 working script
#   - Keeps VisiumV2 x/y swap + auto-rescale
#   - Keeps H&E background and adaptive 2x2 / 1x4 layout
#   - Optional panel titles
#   - Larger Arial legends
#   - Visible NA legend circle

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(Seurat)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
  library(scales)
  library(viridis)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tibble)
  library(grid)
  library(abind)
})

# Settings

SEURAT_OBJ <- merged_seurat

valid_samples <- c(
  "X29.10404", "X29.10408", "X27.10039", "X31.10081", "X29.10423",
  "X27.10094", "X29.10394", "X27.10157", "X28.12265.C", "X29.10439",
  "X29.10405", "X29.10282", "X28.12265.M", "X29.10016"
)
 
out_dir <- "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/figures_for_paper/Spatial Plot/KPMP_DKD/"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# ---------- Plot appearance ----------
HE_ALPHA         <- 0.4
DOT_SIZE         <- 2.0
GWR_COEF_CAP     <- 5
ASPECT_THRESHOLD <- 1.5

SHOW_PANEL_TITLES <- FALSE   # TRUE to show each panel title (pA-pD)
SHOW_SAMPLE_TITLE  <- TRUE    # TRUE to show the sample name at the top

BASE_FONT <- "Arial"

PANEL_TITLE_SIZE <- 12
SAMPLE_TITLE_SIZE <- 20

LEG_TEXT_SIZE  <- 20
LEG_TITLE_SIZE <- 20
LEG_KEY_SIZE   <- 1.2
LEG_DOT_SIZE   <- 7

CBAR_HEIGHT <- 2.5
CBAR_WIDTH  <- 0.50

NA_BORDER_COL <- "#666666"
NA_BORDER_W   <- 1.8

timestamp <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")

# VisiumV2 x/y swap + auto-rescale

get_coords_std <- function(obj, img_name) {
  
  coords_raw <- GetTissueCoordinates(obj, image = img_name)
  
  if ("cell" %in% colnames(coords_raw)) {
    # VisiumV2 format
    # Important: x/y swap is needed for this object
    coords <- data.frame(
      Barcode  = coords_raw$cell,
      imagecol = coords_raw$y,
      imagerow = coords_raw$x,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  } else {
    # VisiumV1-like format
    coords <- data.frame(
      Barcode  = rownames(coords_raw),
      imagecol = coords_raw$imagecol,
      imagerow = coords_raw$imagerow,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
  
  # Auto-rescale if coordinates are much larger than the H&E image size
  img_array <- obj@images[[img_name]]@image
  
  if (!is.null(img_array)) {
    img_w   <- dim(img_array)[2]
    max_col <- max(coords$imagecol, na.rm = TRUE)
    
    if (max_col > img_w * 1.5) {
      sf <- obj@images[[img_name]]@scale.factors
      
      scale_factor <- if (!is.null(sf$lowres)) {
        sf$lowres
      } else {
        img_w / max_col * 0.95
      }
      
      coords$imagecol <- coords$imagecol * scale_factor
      coords$imagerow <- coords$imagerow * scale_factor
      
      cat("    [Auto-rescale: ×", round(scale_factor, 4), "]\n", sep = "")
    }
  }
  
  return(coords)
}

# Image -> Sample lookup

img_sample_map <- data.frame(
  image = Images(SEURAT_OBJ),
  sample = sapply(Images(SEURAT_OBJ), function(img) {
    coords_raw <- GetTissueCoordinates(SEURAT_OBJ, image = img)
    barcodes <- if ("cell" %in% colnames(coords_raw)) {
      coords_raw$cell
    } else {
      rownames(coords_raw)
    }
    unique(SEURAT_OBJ$orig.ident[colnames(SEURAT_OBJ) %in% barcodes])[1]
  }),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

print(img_sample_map)

# Spot labels

SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label <- ifelse(
  !is.na(SEURAT_OBJ$M2_Coeff) &
    SEURAT_OBJ$M2_Coeff > 0 &
    SEURAT_OBJ$M2_AdjP < 0.05,
  "High-coupling",
  "Reference"
)

SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label[is.na(SEURAT_OBJ$M2_Coeff)] <- "NA"

SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label <- factor(
  SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label,
  levels = c("High-coupling", "Reference", "NA")
)

# Color palettes

m2_palette <- function(n = 100) {
  viridis::rocket(n, begin = 0.15, end = 0.95, direction = -1)
}

fib_palette <- function(n = 100) {
  viridis::mako(n, begin = 0.15, end = 0.95, direction = -1)
}

gwr_diverging <- c(
  "#08519C", "#4292C6", "#9ECAE1",
  "#FFEDA0",
  "#FEB24C", "#FD8D3C", "#E31A1C"
)

hc_cols <- c(
  "High-coupling" = "#D55E00",
  "Reference"     = "#666666",
  "NA"            = "#DDDDDD"
)

# H&E layer

get_HE_layer <- function(obj, img_name, alpha = HE_ALPHA) {
  
  img_array <- obj@images[[img_name]]@image
  
  if (is.null(img_array)) {
    warning(paste("No H&E image array for", img_name))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  cat("    H&E array dim:", paste(dim(img_array), collapse = " x "), "\n")
  
  # RGB -> RGBA
  if (length(dim(img_array)) == 3 && dim(img_array)[3] == 3) {
    alpha_layer <- array(
      alpha,
      dim = c(dim(img_array)[1], dim(img_array)[2], 1)
    )
    img_array <- abind::abind(img_array, alpha_layer, along = 3)
  }
  
  list(
    grob   = grid::rasterGrob(img_array, interpolate = TRUE),
    height = dim(img_array)[1],
    width  = dim(img_array)[2]
  )
}

# Continuous panel function

make_panel <- function(coords_s,
                       HE_info,
                       feature,
                       palette_fn,
                       lim,
                       title,
                       oob_method = scales::squish) {
  
  p <- ggplot(
    coords_s,
    aes(x = imagecol, y = -imagerow, color = .data[[feature]])
  )
  
  if (!is.null(HE_info)) {
    p <- p +
      annotation_custom(
        HE_info$grob,
        xmin = 0,
        xmax = HE_info$width,
        ymin = -HE_info$height,
        ymax = 0
      )
  }
  
  p <- p +
    geom_point(size = DOT_SIZE, alpha = 0.9) +
    scale_color_gradientn(
      colors = palette_fn,
      limits = lim,
      oob = oob_method,
      na.value = "#DDDDDD"
    ) +
    guides(
      color = guide_colorbar(
        barheight = unit(CBAR_HEIGHT, "cm"),
        barwidth  = unit(CBAR_WIDTH, "cm"),
        title.position = "top"
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      title = if (SHOW_PANEL_TITLES) title else NULL,
      color = NULL
    ) +
    coord_fixed() +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      
      plot.title = if (SHOW_PANEL_TITLES) {
        element_text(
          hjust = 0.5,
          face = "bold",
          size = PANEL_TITLE_SIZE,
          family = BASE_FONT
        )
      } else {
        element_blank()
      },
      
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.title = element_text(
        size = LEG_TITLE_SIZE,
        face = "bold",
        family = BASE_FONT
      ),
      legend.text = element_text(
        size = LEG_TEXT_SIZE,
        family = BASE_FONT
      ),
      legend.key.height = unit(CBAR_HEIGHT, "cm")
    )
  
  return(p)
}

# High-coupling panel function

make_high_coupling_panel <- function(coords_s,
                                     HE_info,
                                     n_hc) {
  
  # Draw reference / NA first, high-coupling last
  coords_ordered <- coords_s %>%
    arrange(Spot_Label == "High-coupling")
  
  p <- ggplot(
    coords_ordered,
    aes(x = imagecol, y = -imagerow, color = Spot_Label)
  )
  
  if (!is.null(HE_info)) {
    p <- p +
      annotation_custom(
        HE_info$grob,
        xmin = 0,
        xmax = HE_info$width,
        ymin = -HE_info$height,
        ymax = 0
      )
  }
  
  p <- p +
    geom_point(size = DOT_SIZE, alpha = 0.95) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = hc_cols,
      na.value = "#DDDDDD",
      drop = FALSE
    ) +
    guides(
      color = guide_legend(
        override.aes = list(
          shape  = c(16, 16, 21),
          colour = c("#D55E00", "#666666", NA_BORDER_COL),
          fill   = c("#D55E00", "#666666", "#F7F7F7"),
          stroke = c(0, 0, NA_BORDER_W),
          size   = LEG_DOT_SIZE
        )
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      title = if (SHOW_PANEL_TITLES) {
        paste0("High-coupling spots (n = ", n_hc, ")")
      } else {
        NULL
      },
      color = NULL
    ) +
    coord_fixed() +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      
      plot.title = if (SHOW_PANEL_TITLES) {
        element_text(
          hjust = 0.5,
          face = "bold",
          size = PANEL_TITLE_SIZE,
          family = BASE_FONT
        )
      } else {
        element_blank()
      },
      
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.text = element_text(
        size = LEG_TEXT_SIZE,
        family = BASE_FONT
      ),
      legend.key.height = unit(LEG_KEY_SIZE, "cm"),
      legend.key.width  = unit(LEG_KEY_SIZE, "cm")
    )
  
  return(p)
}

# Main loop

cat("============================================================\n")
cat("KPMP DKD cohort - Processing", length(valid_samples), "samples\n")
cat("============================================================\n")

for (target_sample in valid_samples) {
  
  cat("\nGenerating:", target_sample, "\n")
  
  img <- img_sample_map$image[img_sample_map$sample == target_sample]
  
  if (length(img) == 0) {
    cat("  No image - skipping\n")
    next
  }
  
  img <- img[1]
  cat("  Image:", img, "\n")
  
  HE_info <- get_HE_layer(SEURAT_OBJ, img, alpha = HE_ALPHA)
  
  coords_s <- get_coords_std(SEURAT_OBJ, img) %>%
    left_join(
      SEURAT_OBJ@meta.data %>%
        rownames_to_column("Barcode") %>%
        dplyr::select(
          Barcode,
          M2Mac_fraction,
          Fibrosis_Score,
          M2_Coeff,
          Spot_Label
        ),
      by = "Barcode"
    )
  
  n_hc <- sum(coords_s$Spot_Label == "High-coupling", na.rm = TRUE)
  cat("  Spots:", nrow(coords_s), "  HC spots:", n_hc, "\n")
  
  # Color scale limits
  
  m2_vals <- coords_s$M2Mac_fraction[!is.na(coords_s$M2Mac_fraction)]
  
  m2_lim_hi <- if (length(m2_vals) > 0) {
    quantile(m2_vals, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    1
  }
  
  if (is.na(m2_lim_hi) || m2_lim_hi <= 0) {
    m2_lim_hi <- max(m2_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  }
  
  if (is.na(m2_lim_hi) || m2_lim_hi <= 0) {
    m2_lim_hi <- 1e-6
  }
  
  fib_vals <- coords_s$Fibrosis_Score[!is.na(coords_s$Fibrosis_Score)]
  
  fib_lim_lo <- quantile(fib_vals, 0.10, na.rm = TRUE)
  fib_lim_hi <- quantile(fib_vals, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  if (
    is.na(fib_lim_lo) ||
      is.na(fib_lim_hi) ||
      fib_lim_lo == fib_lim_hi
  ) {
    fib_lim_lo <- min(fib_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
    fib_lim_hi <- max(fib_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  }
  
  # Four panels
  
  pA <- make_panel(
    coords_s   = coords_s,
    HE_info    = HE_info,
    feature    = "M2Mac_fraction",
    palette_fn = m2_palette(100),
    lim        = c(0, m2_lim_hi),
    title      = "M2 macrophage score"
  )
  
  pB <- make_panel(
    coords_s   = coords_s,
    HE_info    = HE_info,
    feature    = "Fibrosis_Score",
    palette_fn = fib_palette(100),
    lim        = c(fib_lim_lo, fib_lim_hi),
    title      = "Fibrosis score"
  )
  
  pC <- make_panel(
    coords_s   = coords_s,
    HE_info    = HE_info,
    feature    = "M2_Coeff",
    palette_fn = gwr_diverging,
    lim        = c(-GWR_COEF_CAP, GWR_COEF_CAP),
    title      = "GWR coefficient"
  )
  
  pD <- make_high_coupling_panel(
    coords_s = coords_s,
    HE_info  = HE_info,
    n_hc     = n_hc
  )
  
  # Adaptive layout
  
  tissue_aspect <- diff(range(coords_s$imagerow, na.rm = TRUE)) /
    diff(range(coords_s$imagecol, na.rm = TRUE))
  
  cat(sprintf("  Tissue aspect (H/W): %.2f\n", tissue_aspect))
  
  if (tissue_aspect > ASPECT_THRESHOLD) {
    
    cat("  -> Layout: 1x4 (tall tissue)\n")
    
    fig_map <- pA / pB / pC / pD
    
    if (SHOW_SAMPLE_TITLE) {
      fig_map <- fig_map +
        plot_annotation(
          title = target_sample,
          theme = theme(
            plot.title = element_text(
              hjust = 0.5,
              face = "bold",
              size = SAMPLE_TITLE_SIZE,
              family = BASE_FONT
            )
          )
        )
    }
    
    fig_map <- fig_map &
      theme(
        plot.margin = margin(
          t = 8,
          r = 15,
          b = 8,
          l = 15,
          unit = "pt"
        )
      )
    
    fig_w <- 8
    fig_h <- 24
    
  } else {
    
    cat("  -> Layout: 2x2 (default)\n")
    
    fig_map <- (pA | pB) / (pC | pD)
    
    if (SHOW_SAMPLE_TITLE) {
      fig_map <- fig_map +
        plot_annotation(
          title = target_sample,
          theme = theme(
            plot.title = element_text(
              hjust = 0.5,
              face = "bold",
              size = SAMPLE_TITLE_SIZE,
              family = BASE_FONT
            )
          )
        )
    }
    
    fig_map <- fig_map &
      theme(
        plot.margin = margin(
          t = 10,
          r = 25,
          b = 10,
          l = 25,
          unit = "pt"
        )
      )
    
    fig_w <- 14
    fig_h <- 15
  }
  
  print(fig_map)
  
  # Save
  
  file_base <- file.path(
    out_dir,
    paste0(
      "Spatial_4panel_",
      target_sample,
      "_v11_HE_v9base_",
      timestamp
    )
  )
  
  ggsave(
    filename = paste0(file_base, ".pdf"),
    plot = fig_map,
    width = fig_w,
    height = fig_h,
    units = "in",
    device = cairo_pdf,
    bg = "white"
  )
  
  ggsave(
    filename = paste0(file_base, ".png"),
    plot = fig_map,
    width = fig_w,
    height = fig_h,
    units = "in",
    dpi = 600,
    bg = "white"
  )
  
  cat("  Saved:", file_base, sprintf(" (%dx%d in)\n", fig_w, fig_h))
}

cat("\nDone. KPMP DKD cohort.\n")
cat("Saved in:", out_dir, "\n")
```

```{r Figure_4_KPMP_DKD_Spatial_v12_legendTitle}
# Figure 4: KPMP DKD Spatial Plot v12
#   Base: v9 working script
#   - Keeps VisiumV2 x/y swap + auto-rescale
#   - Keeps H&E background and adaptive 2x2 / 1x4 layout
#   - Adds legend titles, following Fig2A-D style
#   - Optional panel titles
#   - Larger Arial legends
#   - Visible NA legend circle

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(Seurat)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
  library(scales)
  library(viridis)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tibble)
  library(grid)
  library(abind)
})

# Settings

SEURAT_OBJ <- merged_seurat

valid_samples <- c(
  "X29.10404", "X29.10408", "X27.10039", "X31.10081", "X29.10423",
  "X27.10094", "X29.10394", "X27.10157", "X28.12265.C", "X29.10439",
  "X29.10405", "X29.10282", "X28.12265.M", "X29.10016"
)

out_dir <- "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/figures_for_paper/Spatial Plot/KPMP_DKD/"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

timestamp <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")

# Display settings

HE_ALPHA         <- 0.4
DOT_SIZE         <- 2.0
GWR_COEF_CAP     <- 5
ASPECT_THRESHOLD <- 1.5

SHOW_PANEL_TITLES <- FALSE   # TRUE to show each panel title (pA-pD)
SHOW_SAMPLE_TITLE  <- TRUE    # TRUE to show the sample name on top

BASE_FONT <- "Arial"

PANEL_TITLE_SIZE  <- 12
SAMPLE_TITLE_SIZE <- 16

LEG_TITLE_SIZE <- 22
LEG_TEXT_SIZE  <- 22
LEG_TITLE_GAP  <- 18

CBAR_HEIGHT <- 4.8
CBAR_WIDTH  <- 0.8

LEG_KEY_SIZE <- 1.6
LEG_DOT_SIZE <- 6.2

NA_BORDER_COL <- "#666666"
NA_BORDER_W   <- 1.8

# VisiumV2 x/y swap + auto-rescale

get_coords_std <- function(obj, img_name) {
  
  coords_raw <- GetTissueCoordinates(obj, image = img_name)
  
  if ("cell" %in% colnames(coords_raw)) {
    coords <- data.frame(
      Barcode  = coords_raw$cell,
      imagecol = coords_raw$y,
      imagerow = coords_raw$x,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  } else {
    coords <- data.frame(
      Barcode  = rownames(coords_raw),
      imagecol = coords_raw$imagecol,
      imagerow = coords_raw$imagerow,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
  
  img_array <- obj@images[[img_name]]@image
  
  if (!is.null(img_array)) {
    img_w   <- dim(img_array)[2]
    max_col <- max(coords$imagecol, na.rm = TRUE)
    
    if (max_col > img_w * 1.5) {
      sf <- obj@images[[img_name]]@scale.factors
      
      scale_factor <- if (!is.null(sf$lowres)) {
        sf$lowres
      } else {
        img_w / max_col * 0.95
      }
      
      coords$imagecol <- coords$imagecol * scale_factor
      coords$imagerow <- coords$imagerow * scale_factor
      
      cat("    [Auto-rescale: ×", round(scale_factor, 4), "]\n", sep = "")
    }
  }
  
  return(coords)
}

# Image -> Sample lookup

img_sample_map <- data.frame(
  image = Images(SEURAT_OBJ),
  sample = sapply(Images(SEURAT_OBJ), function(img) {
    coords_raw <- GetTissueCoordinates(SEURAT_OBJ, image = img)
    barcodes <- if ("cell" %in% colnames(coords_raw)) {
      coords_raw$cell
    } else {
      rownames(coords_raw)
    }
    unique(SEURAT_OBJ$orig.ident[colnames(SEURAT_OBJ) %in% barcodes])[1]
  }),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

print(img_sample_map)

# Spot labels

SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label <- ifelse(
  !is.na(SEURAT_OBJ$M2_Coeff) &
    SEURAT_OBJ$M2_Coeff > 0 &
    SEURAT_OBJ$M2_AdjP < 0.05,
  "High-coupling",
  "Reference"
)

SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label[is.na(SEURAT_OBJ$M2_Coeff)] <- "NA"

SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label <- factor(
  SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label,
  levels = c("High-coupling", "Reference", "NA")
)

# Color palettes

m2_palette <- function(n = 100) {
  viridis::rocket(n, begin = 0.15, end = 0.95, direction = -1)
}

fib_palette <- function(n = 100) {
  viridis::mako(n, begin = 0.15, end = 0.95, direction = -1)
}

gwr_diverging <- c(
  "#08519C", "#4292C6", "#9ECAE1",
  "#FFEDA0",
  "#FEB24C", "#FD8D3C", "#E31A1C"
)

hc_cols <- c(
  "High-coupling" = "#D55E00",
  "Reference"     = "#666666",
  "NA"            = "#DDDDDD"
)

# H&E layer

get_HE_layer <- function(obj, img_name, alpha = HE_ALPHA) {
  
  img_array <- obj@images[[img_name]]@image
  
  if (is.null(img_array)) {
    warning(paste("No H&E image array for", img_name))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  cat("    H&E array dim:", paste(dim(img_array), collapse = " x "), "\n")
  
  if (length(dim(img_array)) == 3 && dim(img_array)[3] == 3) {
    alpha_layer <- array(
      alpha,
      dim = c(dim(img_array)[1], dim(img_array)[2], 1)
    )
    img_array <- abind::abind(img_array, alpha_layer, along = 3)
  }
  
  list(
    grob   = grid::rasterGrob(img_array, interpolate = TRUE),
    height = dim(img_array)[1],
    width  = dim(img_array)[2]
  )
}

# Continuous panel function

make_panel <- function(coords_s,
                       HE_info,
                       feature,
                       palette_fn,
                       lim,
                       title,
                       color_label,
                       oob_method = scales::squish) {
  
  p <- ggplot(
    coords_s,
    aes(x = imagecol, y = -imagerow, color = .data[[feature]])
  )
  
  if (!is.null(HE_info)) {
    p <- p +
      annotation_custom(
        HE_info$grob,
        xmin = 0,
        xmax = HE_info$width,
        ymin = -HE_info$height,
        ymax = 0
      )
  }
  
  p <- p +
    geom_point(size = DOT_SIZE, alpha = 0.9) +
    scale_color_gradientn(
      colors = palette_fn,
      limits = lim,
      oob = oob_method,
      na.value = "#DDDDDD"
    ) +
    guides(
      color = guide_colorbar(
        barheight = unit(CBAR_HEIGHT, "cm"),
        barwidth  = unit(CBAR_WIDTH, "cm"),
        title.position = "top"
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      title = if (SHOW_PANEL_TITLES) title else NULL,
      color = color_label
    ) +
    coord_fixed() +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      
      plot.title = if (SHOW_PANEL_TITLES) {
        element_text(
          hjust = 0.5,
          face = "bold",
          size = PANEL_TITLE_SIZE,
          family = BASE_FONT
        )
      } else {
        element_blank()
      },
      
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.title = element_text(
        size = LEG_TITLE_SIZE,
        face = "bold",
        family = BASE_FONT,
        margin = margin(b = LEG_TITLE_GAP)
      ),
      legend.text = element_text(
        size = LEG_TEXT_SIZE,
        family = BASE_FONT
      ),
      legend.key.height = unit(CBAR_HEIGHT, "cm")
    )
  
  return(p)
}

# High-coupling panel function

make_high_coupling_panel <- function(coords_s,
                                     HE_info,
                                     n_hc) {
  
  coords_ordered <- coords_s %>%
    arrange(Spot_Label == "High-coupling")
  
  p <- ggplot(
    coords_ordered,
    aes(x = imagecol, y = -imagerow, color = Spot_Label)
  )
  
  if (!is.null(HE_info)) {
    p <- p +
      annotation_custom(
        HE_info$grob,
        xmin = 0,
        xmax = HE_info$width,
        ymin = -HE_info$height,
        ymax = 0
      )
  }
  
  p <- p +
    geom_point(size = DOT_SIZE, alpha = 0.95) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = hc_cols,
      na.value = "#999999",
      drop = FALSE
    ) +
    guides(
      color = guide_legend(
        override.aes = list(
          shape  = c(16, 16, 21),
          colour = c("#D55E00", "#666666", NA_BORDER_COL),
          fill   = c("#D55E00", "#666666", "#F7F7F7"),
          stroke = c(0, 0, NA_BORDER_W),
          size   = LEG_DOT_SIZE
        )
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      title = if (SHOW_PANEL_TITLES) {
        paste0("High-coupling spots (n = ", n_hc, ")")
      } else {
        NULL
      },
      color = NULL
    ) +
    coord_fixed() +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      
      plot.title = if (SHOW_PANEL_TITLES) {
        element_text(
          hjust = 0.5,
          face = "bold",
          size = PANEL_TITLE_SIZE,
          family = BASE_FONT
        )
      } else {
        element_blank()
      },
      
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.title = element_text(
        size = LEG_TITLE_SIZE,
        face = "bold",
        family = BASE_FONT,
        margin = margin(b = LEG_TITLE_GAP)
      ),
      legend.text = element_text(
        size = LEG_TEXT_SIZE,
        family = BASE_FONT
      ),
      legend.key.height = unit(LEG_KEY_SIZE, "cm"),
      legend.key.width  = unit(LEG_KEY_SIZE, "cm"),
      legend.box.spacing = unit(0.1, "cm"),
      legend.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
      legend.box.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0)
    )
  
  return(p)
}

# Main loop

cat("============================================================\n")
cat("KPMP DKD cohort - Processing", length(valid_samples), "samples\n")
cat("============================================================\n")

for (target_sample in valid_samples) {
  
  cat("\nGenerating:", target_sample, "\n")
  
  img <- img_sample_map$image[img_sample_map$sample == target_sample]
  
  if (length(img) == 0) {
    cat("  No image - skipping\n")
    next
  }
  
  img <- img[1]
  cat("  Image:", img, "\n")
  
  HE_info <- get_HE_layer(SEURAT_OBJ, img, alpha = HE_ALPHA)
  
  coords_s <- get_coords_std(SEURAT_OBJ, img) %>%
    left_join(
      SEURAT_OBJ@meta.data %>%
        rownames_to_column("Barcode") %>%
        dplyr::select(
          Barcode,
          M2Mac_fraction,
          Fibrosis_Score,
          M2_Coeff,
          Spot_Label
        ),
      by = "Barcode"
    )
  
  n_hc <- sum(coords_s$Spot_Label == "High-coupling", na.rm = TRUE)
  cat("  Spots:", nrow(coords_s), "  HC spots:", n_hc, "\n")
  
  # Color scale limits
  
  m2_vals <- coords_s$M2Mac_fraction[!is.na(coords_s$M2Mac_fraction)]
  
  m2_lim_hi <- if (length(m2_vals) > 0) {
    quantile(m2_vals, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    1
  }
  
  if (is.na(m2_lim_hi) || m2_lim_hi <= 0) {
    m2_lim_hi <- max(m2_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  }
  
  if (is.na(m2_lim_hi) || m2_lim_hi <= 0) {
    m2_lim_hi <- 1e-6
  }
  
  fib_vals <- coords_s$Fibrosis_Score[!is.na(coords_s$Fibrosis_Score)]
  
  fib_lim_lo <- quantile(fib_vals, 0.10, na.rm = TRUE)
  fib_lim_hi <- quantile(fib_vals, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  if (
    is.na(fib_lim_lo) ||
      is.na(fib_lim_hi) ||
      fib_lim_lo == fib_lim_hi
  ) {
    fib_lim_lo <- min(fib_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
    fib_lim_hi <- max(fib_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  }
  
  # Four panels
  
  pA <- make_panel(
    coords_s    = coords_s,
    HE_info     = HE_info,
    feature     = "M2Mac_fraction",
    palette_fn  = m2_palette(100),
    lim         = c(0, m2_lim_hi),
    title       = "M2 macrophage score",
    color_label = "M2Mac"
  )
  
  pB <- make_panel(
    coords_s    = coords_s,
    HE_info     = HE_info,
    feature     = "Fibrosis_Score",
    palette_fn  = fib_palette(100),
    lim         = c(fib_lim_lo, fib_lim_hi),
    title       = "Fibrosis score",
    color_label = "Fibrosis"
  )
  
  pC <- make_panel(
    coords_s    = coords_s,
    HE_info     = HE_info,
    feature     = "M2_Coeff",
    palette_fn  = gwr_diverging,
    lim         = c(-GWR_COEF_CAP, GWR_COEF_CAP),
    title       = "GWR coefficient",
    color_label = "Coeff"
  )
  
  pD <- make_high_coupling_panel(
    coords_s    = coords_s,
    HE_info     = HE_info,
    n_hc        = n_hc
  )
  
  # Adaptive layout
  
  tissue_aspect <- diff(range(coords_s$imagerow, na.rm = TRUE)) /
    diff(range(coords_s$imagecol, na.rm = TRUE))
  
  cat(sprintf("  Tissue aspect (H/W): %.2f\n", tissue_aspect))
  
  if (tissue_aspect > ASPECT_THRESHOLD) {
    
    cat("  -> Layout: 1x4 (tall tissue)\n")
    
    fig_map <- pA / pB / pC / pD
    
    if (SHOW_SAMPLE_TITLE) {
      fig_map <- fig_map +
        plot_annotation(
          title = target_sample,
          theme = theme(
            plot.title = element_text(
              hjust = 0.5,
              face = "bold",
              size = SAMPLE_TITLE_SIZE,
              family = BASE_FONT
            )
          )
        )
    }
    
    fig_map <- fig_map &
      theme(
        plot.margin = margin(
          t = 8,
          r = 15,
          b = 8,
          l = 15,
          unit = "pt"
        )
      )
    
    fig_w <- 8
    fig_h <- 24
    
  } else {
    
    cat("  -> Layout: 2x2 (default)\n")
    
    fig_map <- (pA | pB) / (pC | pD)
    
    if (SHOW_SAMPLE_TITLE) {
      fig_map <- fig_map +
        plot_annotation(
          title = target_sample,
          theme = theme(
            plot.title = element_text(
              hjust = 0.5,
              face = "bold",
              size = SAMPLE_TITLE_SIZE,
              family = BASE_FONT
            )
          )
        )
    }
    
    fig_map <- fig_map &
      theme(
        plot.margin = margin(
          t = 10,
          r = 25,
          b = 10,
          l = 25,
          unit = "pt"
        )
      )
    
    fig_w <- 20
    fig_h <- 15
  }
  
  print(fig_map)
  
  # Save
  
  file_base <- file.path(
    out_dir,
    paste0(
      "Spatial_4panel_",
      target_sample,
      "_v12_HE_v9base_legendTitle_",
      timestamp
    )
  )
  
  ggsave(
    filename = paste0(file_base, ".pdf"),
    plot = fig_map,
    width = fig_w,
    height = fig_h,
    units = "in",
    device = cairo_pdf,
    bg = "white"
  )
  
  ggsave(
    filename = paste0(file_base, ".png"),
    plot = fig_map,
    width = fig_w,
    height = fig_h,
    units = "in",
    dpi = 600,
    bg = "white"
  )
  
  cat("  Saved:", file_base, sprintf(" (%dx%d in)\n", fig_w, fig_h))
}

cat("\nDone. KPMP DKD cohort.\n")
cat("Saved in:", out_dir, "\n")
```

```{r KPMP HKD}
# Figure 5: KPMP HKD Spatial Plot - styled (matched to PoC)
#   - keeps VisiumV2 x/y swap + auto-rescale
#   - PoC style: toggle / Arial / large legend / NA outline / enlarged colorbar / timestamp
#   - 9 samples (passing the DEG threshold)
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(Seurat); library(ggplot2); library(dplyr); library(tibble)
  library(patchwork); library(grid); library(scales); library(viridis); library(abind)
})

# Settings
SEURAT_OBJ <- merged_hkd
valid_samples <- c(
  "X31.10063", "X31.10221", "X31.10336",
  "X28.12518", "X29.10410", "X28.12613",
  "X31.10090", "X29.10400", "X31.10219"
)
out_dir <- "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/figures_for_paper/Spatial Plot/KPMP_HKD/"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
timestamp <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")

# -------- Display settings --------
HE_ALPHA <- 0.6
SHOW_PANEL_TITLES <- FALSE   # TRUE to show each panel title (pA-pD)
SHOW_FIGURE_TITLE <- TRUE    # TRUE to show the sample name on top
TITLE_FONT <- "Arial"
LEG_FONT   <- "Arial"
TITLE_SIZE     <- 24
FIG_TITLE_SIZE <- 16
LEG_TITLE_SIZE <- 20
LEG_TEXT_SIZE  <- 20
CBAR_HEIGHT <- 4.3  # color bar height, cm
CBAR_WIDTH  <- 0.7  # color bar width, cm
LEG_KEY     <- 1.1  # discrete legend key size, cm
LEG_DOT_SIZE <- 8
LEG_TITLE_GAP <- 16
PANEL_HGAP    <- 14
NA_BORDER_COL <- "#999999"
NA_BORDER_W   <- 1.5
DOT_SIZE <- 2.5      # larger because KPMP HKD spots are sparse (adjust as needed)
GWR_COEF_CAP <- 5

cat("KPMP HKD cohort - Processing", length(valid_samples), "samples\n")

# VisiumV2: x/y swap support + auto-rescale (rotation-corrected)
#   VisiumV2: x = pixel_row (vertical), y = pixel_col (horizontal) -> SWAP
get_coords_std <- function(obj, img_name) {
  coords_raw <- GetTissueCoordinates(obj, image = img_name)

  if ("cell" %in% colnames(coords_raw)) {
    # VisiumV2: x = pixel_row (vertical), y = pixel_col (horizontal) -> SWAP
    coords <- data.frame(
      Barcode  = coords_raw$cell,
      imagecol = coords_raw$y,    # y is horizontal
      imagerow = coords_raw$x,    # x is vertical
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  } else {
    # VisiumV1: as-is
    coords <- data.frame(
      Barcode  = rownames(coords_raw),
      imagecol = coords_raw$imagecol,
      imagerow = coords_raw$imagerow,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }

  # auto scaling
  img_array <- obj@images[[img_name]]@image
  if (!is.null(img_array)) {
    img_w <- dim(img_array)[2]
    max_col <- max(coords$imagecol, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (max_col > img_w * 1.5) {
      sf <- obj@images[[img_name]]@scale.factors
      scale_factor <- if (!is.null(sf$lowres)) sf$lowres else img_w / max_col * 0.95
      coords$imagecol <- coords$imagecol * scale_factor
      coords$imagerow <- coords$imagerow * scale_factor
      cat("    [Auto-rescale: ×", round(scale_factor, 4), "]\n", sep = "")
    }
  }
  coords
}

# Image -> Sample lookup (handles the "cell" column)
img_sample_map <- data.frame(
  image  = Images(SEURAT_OBJ),
  sample = sapply(Images(SEURAT_OBJ), function(img) {
    coords_raw <- GetTissueCoordinates(SEURAT_OBJ, image = img)
    barcodes <- if ("cell" %in% colnames(coords_raw)) coords_raw$cell else rownames(coords_raw)
    unique(SEURAT_OBJ$orig.ident[colnames(SEURAT_OBJ) %in% barcodes])[1]
  }),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
print(img_sample_map)

# Spot label
SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label <- ifelse(
  !is.na(SEURAT_OBJ$M2_Coeff) & SEURAT_OBJ$M2_Coeff > 0 & SEURAT_OBJ$M2_AdjP < 0.05,
  "High-coupling", "Reference"
)
SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label[is.na(SEURAT_OBJ$M2_Coeff)] <- "NA"
SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label <- factor(SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label,
                                levels = c("High-coupling", "Reference", "NA"))

# Color palettes
m2_palette  <- function(n = 100) viridis::rocket(n, begin = 0.15, end = 0.95, direction = -1)
fib_palette <- function(n = 100) viridis::mako  (n, begin = 0.15, end = 0.95, direction = -1)
gwr_diverging <- c("#08519C", "#4292C6", "#9ECAE1",
                   "#FFEDA0",
                   "#FEB24C", "#FD8D3C", "#E31A1C")
hc_cols <- c("High-coupling" = "#D55E00",
             "Reference"     = "#666666",
             "NA"            = "#DDDDDD")

# H&E layer helper
get_HE_layer <- function(obj, img_name, alpha = HE_ALPHA) {
  img_array <- obj@images[[img_name]]@image
  if (is.null(img_array)) return(NULL)
  if (length(dim(img_array)) == 3 && dim(img_array)[3] == 3) {
    alpha_layer <- array(alpha, dim = c(dim(img_array)[1], dim(img_array)[2], 1))
    img_array <- abind::abind(img_array, alpha_layer, along = 3)
  }
  list(grob = grid::rasterGrob(img_array, interpolate = TRUE),
       height = dim(img_array)[1], width = dim(img_array)[2])
}

# Continuous spatial panel
make_panel <- function(coords_s, HE_info, feature, palette_fn, lim,
                       title, color_label, oob_method = scales::squish) {
  p <- ggplot(coords_s, aes(x = imagecol, y = -imagerow, color = .data[[feature]]))
  if (!is.null(HE_info)) {
    p <- p + annotation_custom(HE_info$grob,
                               xmin = 0, xmax = HE_info$width,
                               ymin = -HE_info$height, ymax = 0)
  }
  p <- p +
    geom_point(size = DOT_SIZE, alpha = 0.9) +
    scale_color_gradientn(colors = palette_fn, limits = lim,
                          oob = oob_method, na.value = "#DDDDDD") +
    guides(color = guide_colorbar(barheight = unit(CBAR_HEIGHT, "cm"),
                                  barwidth  = unit(CBAR_WIDTH, "cm"),
                                  title.position = "top")) +
    labs(title = if (SHOW_PANEL_TITLES) title else NULL, color = color_label) +
    coord_fixed() + theme_void() +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.title = if (SHOW_PANEL_TITLES)
        element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = TITLE_SIZE, family = TITLE_FONT)
        else element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.title = element_text(size = LEG_TITLE_SIZE, face = "bold",
                                  family = LEG_FONT, margin = margin(b = LEG_TITLE_GAP)),
      legend.text  = element_text(size = LEG_TEXT_SIZE, family = LEG_FONT),
      legend.key.height = unit(CBAR_HEIGHT, "cm"),
      legend.box.spacing = unit(0.1, "cm"),
      legend.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
      legend.box.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0)
    )
  return(p)
}

# Discrete high-coupling panel
make_high_coupling_panel <- function(coords_s, HE_info, n_hc) {
  coords_ordered <- coords_s %>% arrange(Spot_Label == "High-coupling")
  p <- ggplot(coords_ordered, aes(x = imagecol, y = -imagerow, color = Spot_Label))
  if (!is.null(HE_info)) {
    p <- p + annotation_custom(HE_info$grob,
                               xmin = 0, xmax = HE_info$width,
                               ymin = -HE_info$height, ymax = 0)
  }
  p <- p +
    geom_point(size = DOT_SIZE, alpha = 0.95) +
    scale_color_manual(values = hc_cols, na.value = "#999999", drop = FALSE) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(
      shape  = c(16, 16, 21),
      colour = c("#D55E00", "#666666", NA_BORDER_COL),
      fill   = c("#D55E00", "#666666", "#F7F7F7"),
      stroke = c(0, 0, NA_BORDER_W),
      size   = LEG_DOT_SIZE
    ))) +
    labs(title = if (SHOW_PANEL_TITLES) paste0("High-coupling Spots (n = ", n_hc, ")") else NULL,
         color = NULL) +
    coord_fixed() + theme_void() +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.title = if (SHOW_PANEL_TITLES)
        element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = TITLE_SIZE, family = TITLE_FONT)
        else element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.text = element_text(size = LEG_TEXT_SIZE, family = LEG_FONT),
      legend.key.height = unit(LEG_KEY, "cm"),
      legend.key.width  = unit(LEG_KEY, "cm")
    )
  return(p)
}

# Main loop (test with 1 sample first)
for (target_sample in valid_samples) {
  cat("\nGenerating:", target_sample, "\n")
  img <- img_sample_map$image[img_sample_map$sample == target_sample]
  if (length(img) == 0) { cat("  No image - skipping\n"); next }
  img <- img[1]

  HE_info <- get_HE_layer(SEURAT_OBJ, img, alpha = HE_ALPHA)

  coords_s <- get_coords_std(SEURAT_OBJ, img) %>%
    left_join(SEURAT_OBJ@meta.data %>%
                rownames_to_column("Barcode") %>%
                dplyr::select(Barcode, M2Mac_fraction, Fibrosis_Score,
                              M2_Coeff, Spot_Label),
              by = "Barcode")

  n_hc <- sum(coords_s$Spot_Label == "High-coupling", na.rm = TRUE)
  cat("  HC spots:", n_hc, "\n")

  # Per-sample color limits
  m2_vals <- coords_s$M2Mac_fraction[!is.na(coords_s$M2Mac_fraction)]
  m2_lim_hi <- if (length(m2_vals) > 0) quantile(m2_vals, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE) else 1
  if (is.na(m2_lim_hi) || m2_lim_hi <= 0) m2_lim_hi <- max(m2_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (is.na(m2_lim_hi) || m2_lim_hi <= 0) m2_lim_hi <- 1e-6

  fib_vals <- coords_s$Fibrosis_Score[!is.na(coords_s$Fibrosis_Score)]
  fib_lim_lo <- quantile(fib_vals, 0.10, na.rm = TRUE)
  fib_lim_hi <- quantile(fib_vals, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (is.na(fib_lim_lo) || is.na(fib_lim_hi) || fib_lim_lo == fib_lim_hi) {
    fib_lim_lo <- min(fib_vals, na.rm = TRUE); fib_lim_hi <- max(fib_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  }

  # Four panels
  pA <- make_panel(coords_s, HE_info, "M2Mac_fraction", m2_palette(100), c(0, m2_lim_hi),
                   paste0("M2 Macrophage Score (0–", round(m2_lim_hi, 3), ")"), "M2Mac")
  pB <- make_panel(coords_s, HE_info, "Fibrosis_Score", fib_palette(100), c(fib_lim_lo, fib_lim_hi),
                   paste0("Fibrosis Score (", round(fib_lim_lo, 2), "–", round(fib_lim_hi, 2), ")"),
                   "Fibrosis")
  pC <- make_panel(coords_s, HE_info, "M2_Coeff", gwr_diverging, c(-GWR_COEF_CAP, GWR_COEF_CAP),
                   paste0("GWR Coefficient (±", GWR_COEF_CAP, ")"), "Coeff")
  pD <- make_high_coupling_panel(coords_s, HE_info, n_hc)

  # Combine
  fig_map <- (pA | pB) / (pC | pD)
  if (SHOW_FIGURE_TITLE) {
    fig_map <- fig_map +
      plot_annotation(title = target_sample,
                      theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold",
                                                              size = FIG_TITLE_SIZE,
                                                              family = TITLE_FONT)))
  }
  fig_map <- fig_map &
    theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 4, r = PANEL_HGAP, b = 4, l = PANEL_HGAP))

  print(fig_map)

  # Save
  title_tag <- if (SHOW_PANEL_TITLES) "withPanelTitle" else "noPanelTitle"
  file_base <- file.path(out_dir,
    paste0("Spatial_4panel_", target_sample, "_HE_", title_tag, "_", timestamp))
  ggsave(paste0(file_base, ".pdf"), fig_map,
         width = 16, height = 13, units = "in", device = cairo_pdf)
  ggsave(paste0(file_base, ".png"), fig_map,
         width = 16, height = 13, units = "in", dpi = 300, bg = "white")
  cat("  ✓ Saved:", file_base, "\n")
}
cat("\nDone. KPMP HKD cohort.\nSaved in:", out_dir, "\n")
```
